name: 41_Stock_Classification_KNN_YahooFinance_ML
query: Tengeneza mfumo wa uainishaji wa hisa kwa kutumia mfano wa KNN kwenye seti ya data ya Yahoo Finance. Utekelezaji wako unapaswa kuamua ikiwa hisa fulani itaongezeka au kupungua bei. Anza kwa kupakia seti ya data na kufanya uhandisi wa vipengele, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuzalisha viashiria vya kiufundi na kuchagua vipengele muhimu zaidi katika `src/data_loader.py`. Sanifisha data ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tumia kisanidi cha KNN kuainisha hisa kulingana na vipengele vilivyoundwa, na uhifadhi utekelezaji katika `src/model.py`. Kisha, hifadhi matokeo ya uainishaji katika `results/classification_results.txt`, na onyesha uhusiano kati ya viashiria vya kiufundi na matokeo ya uainishaji kama ramani ya joto kwa kutumia seaborn. Hifadhi ramani ya joto kama `results/figures/feature_correlation_heatmap.png`. Hatimaye, tengeneza Jupyter Notebook inayoweza kuingiliana chini ya `results/` ambayo inaelezea mchakato, inaonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji, na itasaidia kurahisisha masasisho ya baadaye yanayoanzisha data mpya.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Yahoo Finance" inatumika, ikiwa ni pamoja na upakiaji na maandalizi ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uhandisi wa vipengele unafanywa, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuzalisha viashiria vya kiufundi na kufanya uteuzi wa vipengele katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Data inasanifishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
"Kisanidi cha KNN" kinatumika kuainisha hisa kulingana na vipengele vilivyoundwa. Tafadhali hifadhi utekelezaji katika `src/model.py`.
Ramani ya joto inayoonyesha uhusiano kati ya viashiria vya kiufundi na matokeo ya uainishaji inahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/feature_correlation_heatmap.png`.
Jupyter Notebook inayoweza kuingiliana inatengenezwa chini ya `results/` ili kuelezea mchakato na kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji.

preferences.criteria: Jupyter Notebook inapaswa kujumuisha maelezo wazi ya kila hatua, ikiwa ni pamoja na uhandisi wa vipengele na tathmini ya mfano.
Ramani ya joto ya uhusiano inapaswa kuonyesha viashiria vya kiufundi muhimu zaidi na kutoa ufahamu juu ya uhusiano wao.
Mfumo unapaswa kuruhusu masasisho rahisi na data mpya, na kufanya notebook iwe rahisi kwa uchambuzi wa baadaye.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Yahoo Finance" inatumika, ikiwa ni pamoja na upakiaji na maandalizi ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.

The requirement for data standardization is not satisfied. The provided code in `src/data_loader.py` contains only a placeholder function `build_transforms()` that returns a list of strings including "normalization", but there is no actual implementation of data standardization or scaling. The trajectory evidence further indicates that the data processing failed with a `ValueError` related to NaN or infinite values during a standardization step, which confirms that the intended standardization process did not complete successfully. Therefore, the criterion for ensuring feature values are within the same range through standardization is not met.

The provided `src/model.py` file contains only a minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging with placeholder code and does not implement an actual KNN classifier for stock classification. The file shows a `build_model()` function that returns a string placeholder instead of creating or training a KNN model. Additionally, trajectory evidence indicates execution failures including syntax errors, convergence warnings, and runtime memory allocation errors, confirming the implementation is not functional. The requirement to apply a KNN classifier to classify stocks based on engineered features and save the implementation in `src/model.py` is not satisfied.
